title: Are you a ‘HENRY’? Why 90% of financial advisers will waive their minimums to get your business.
summary: Most financial advisory firms' $500,000 to $1 million minimum investment requirements are largely marketing tools rather than firm barriers to entry. Advisers regularly waive these minimums to attract high-income earners (HENRYs), making advisory services more accessible than their publicized thresholds suggest.
content: Most advisory firms’ $500,000 or $1 million thresholds are actually just branding tools. Here’s how to tell if you’re actually a good fit for their services.

zh.title: 你是"HENRY"吗？为什么90%的财务顾问会放弃最低额度来吸引你的业务
zh.summary: 大多数财务咨询公司的50万至100万美元最低投资要求在很大程度上是营销工具而非进入障碍。顾问经常放弃这些最低要求以吸引高收入人群(HENRYs)，使财务咨询服务比公布的门槛更容易获得。

title: This is the defense sector’s fastest grower — and a $20 billion trade most investors are missing
summary: Counter-drone technology has become an essential military procurement for government agencies worldwide, from Washington to Saudi Arabia, representing a $20 billion market opportunity. This rapidly growing defense sector remains overlooked by many investors despite strong demand from geopolitically critical buyers.
content: ‘Drone-killing’ technology is now a must-have for government agencies — from Washington to Riyadh.

zh.title: 这是国防部门增长最快的领域——一笔价值200亿美元的交易大多数投资者都错过了
zh.summary: 反无人机技术已成为全球政府机构（从华盛顿到沙特阿拉伯）的必需军事采购，代表了一个200亿美元的市场机会。尽管地缘政治关键买家的需求强劲，但这个快速增长的国防部门仍被许多投资者忽视。

title: Vance says 'the ball is in Iran's court' to move peace talks further, as U.S. blockade takes effect
summary: Vice President Vance stated that recent U.S. diplomatic talks with Iran in Islamabad have made progress, with special envoys Witkoff and Kushner advancing negotiations. With new U.S. sanctions now in effect, Vance indicated responsibility for the next steps rests with Iran.
content: The U.S. team of Vance and special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner made progress with Iran during the Islamabad talks, the vice president said.

zh.title: 万斯表示伊朗需采取行动推进和平谈判，美国封锁措施已生效
zh.summary: 副总统万斯表示最近美国与伊朗在伊斯兰堡的外交谈判取得进展，特使维茨科夫和库什纳正在推进谈判。随着美国新制裁现已生效，万斯表示下一步行动的责任在伊朗。

title: If you’ve ever been tempted to ‘sell in May and go away’ — now is the time
summary: The stock market's "Halloween Indicator"—the pattern of "sell in May and go away"—is statistically significant only during specific years of the presidential election cycle. This timing consideration may be particularly relevant for investors during the current market cycle.
content: The stock market’s “Halloween Indicator” is statistically significant during just one year of the presidential cycle.

zh.title: 如果你曾想过'五月卖出去度假'——现在是时候了
zh.summary: 股市的'万圣节指标'——'五月卖出去度假'的模式——仅在总统选举周期的特定年份具有统计学意义。这种时间考虑可能对当前市场周期中的投资者特别相关。

title: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
summary: Europe has multiple promising quantum computing companies positioned to compete in this emerging technology sector with significant growth potential. The continent could establish meaningful leadership in quantum technology if these companies execute effectively.
content: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?

zh.title: 量子计算：欧洲能赢得的技术竞赛吗?
zh.summary: 欧洲拥有多家有前景的量子计算公司，有能力在这个新兴技术领域竞争，具有巨大的增长潜力。如果这些公司有效执行，该大陆可以在量子技术中建立有意义的领导地位。

title: Suspect in attack at Sam Altman's house aimed to kill OpenAI CEO, warned of humanity's extinction from AI
summary: A suspect arrested in an attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home intended to kill him, according to documents recovered by San Francisco Police. The suspect's writings referenced concerns about artificial intelligence posing existential risks to humanity.
content: San Francisco Police Department officers recovered a document from the suspect that detailed his intentions, according to a filing.

zh.title: 山姆·奥特曼住宅被袭案嫌疑人意图杀害OpenAI首席执行官，警告人类面临AI灭绝风险
zh.summary: 据旧金山警察局发现的文件显示，一名在对OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼住宅的袭击中被捕的嫌疑人打算杀害他。该嫌疑人的文件中提到了对人工智能对人类构成存亡威胁的担忧。

title: S&P 500 futures are little changed after index erases Iran war losses: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 has recovered losses attributed to Iran-related geopolitical tensions, with futures showing minimal movement as markets demonstrate resilience. Wall Street quickly digested the security developments and returned to normal trading patterns.
content: Wall Street once again proved resilient in the face of increased geopolitical uncertainty.

zh.title: 标普500指数期货在抹去伊朗战争损失后变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数已从伊朗相关地缘政治紧张局势造成的损失中恢复，期货显示最小波动，市场显示出韧性。华尔街迅速消化了安全事件发展，并恢复了正常交易模式。

title: Rep. Eric Swalwell resigns from U.S. House after sexual misconduct allegations
summary: U.S. Representative Eric Swalwell has resigned from Congress following published allegations of sexual misconduct, ending his political career. Swalwell was previously a candidate for California governor before the recent allegations emerged.
content: Rep. Eric Swalwell was a leading candidate for California governor but faced growing calls to resign after allegations of sexual misconduct were published last week.

zh.title: 埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔议员因性骚扰指控辞去美国众议院职务
zh.summary: 美国众议院议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔在公开的性骚扰指控后辞去国会职务，结束了他的政治生涯。斯瓦尔韦尔此前曾是加州州长候选人，但最近的指控浮出水面。

title: Jim Cramer says this is the real reason why stocks are shrugging off Iran war fears
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer attributes stock market resilience amid Iran tensions to stable interest rates, arguing the market would shift dramatically if rates were rising. The implication is that rate stability allows investors to overlook geopolitical risks.
content: "If interest rates were spiking, this market would be very different," CNBC's Jim Cramer said Monday.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默表示这是股市不理会伊朗战争担忧的真实原因
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默将伊朗紧张局势中股票市场的韧性归因于稳定的利率，他辩称如果利率上升，市场会发生戏剧性的变化。这意味着利率稳定使投资者能够忽视地缘政治风险。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: China's AI glasses have something Meta doesn't
summary: A Chinese company claims competitive advantages in the smart glasses market that differentiate its AI glasses from Meta's offerings. The development indicates intensifying competition between U.S. and Chinese tech companies in emerging wearable technology.
content: One Chinese company claims it has the recipe for success in the increasingly competitive smart glasses market

zh.title: CNBC《中国连接》通讯:中国的AI眼镜有Meta没有的东西
zh.summary: 一家中国公司声称在智能眼镜市场上具有竞争优势,使其AI眼镜与Meta的产品有所不同。这一发展表明美国和中国科技公司在新兴可穿戴技术领域的竞争加剧。

title: We asked our wedding guests to give money to St. Jude’s Children’s Hospital. Can we write off their donations?
summary: A couple redirected wedding gifts to St. Jude's Children's Hospital, raising substantial funds, but tax questions arise regarding deductibility. The query highlights the intersection of charitable giving, personal events, and tax implications.
content: “There were substantial donations made.”

zh.title: 我们要求婚礼宾客向圣犹德儿童研究医院捐款。我们能抵税吗？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇将婚礼礼物重定向到圣犹德儿童研究医院，筹集了大量资金，但税收抵扣性问题随之而来。该问题突出了慈善捐款、个人活动和税务影响的交叉点。

title: Intel’s stock just had its best 9-day stretch on record. Can it go even higher?
summary: Intel's stock has experienced its strongest 9-day performance in company history, though analysts note the stock is already richly valued at current levels. A key catalyst remains on the horizon that could potentially drive further gains.
content: The chip maker’s stock is already richly valued, an analyst says, but a key catalyst is still on the way

zh.title: 英特尔股票刚创造了有记录以来最好的9天表现。它能继续上涨吗？
zh.summary: 英特尔股票经历了公司历史上最强劲的9天表现，但分析师指出该股票在当前价格水平上已经估值过高。一个关键的催化剂仍在地平线上，可能会推动进一步的涨幅。

title: Oracle expands Bloom Energy deal days after receiving $400 million stock warrant
summary: Oracle announced an expanded partnership with Bloom Energy just days after receiving a warrant to purchase nearly $400 million in Bloom Energy stock. Bloom Energy's stock surged on news of the expanded deal and Oracle's increased involvement.
content: Last week Oracle received a warrant to buy nearly $400 million in Bloom Energy's stock, which jumped on Monday after the companies announced an expanded deal.

zh.title: Oracle在获得4亿美元股票认股权证后数天内扩大与Bloom Energy的交易
zh.summary: Oracle在获得认股权证购买近4亿美元Bloom Energy股票后数天内宣布了与Bloom Energy的扩大伙伴关系。Bloom Energy的股票因扩大交易和Oracle增加参与的消息而飙升。

title: ‘I am at a crossroads’: I’m 37 and have $1.3 million. Do I stop working to spend time with my young kids?
summary: A 37-year-old with $1.3 million in assets is contemplating early retirement to spend more time with young children (ages 5 and 2), seeing them awake only about 90 minutes daily. The question reflects the tension between financial security and family time quality.
content: “Right now, we only see our kids (ages 5 and 2) awake for about 90 minutes a day.”

zh.title: '我处于十字路口'：我37岁有130万美元。我应该停止工作以便与年幼的孩子们共度时光吗?
zh.summary: 一位拥有130万美元资产的37岁成年人正在考虑提前退休，以便与年幼的孩子(5岁和2岁)共度更多时光，目前每天只见到他们约90分钟。这个问题反映了财务安全与家庭陪伴质量之间的紧张关系。

title: My friend’s girlfriend went ‘ballistic’ after learning he gives his kids $19,000 a year. Is this a red flag?
summary: A woman objected strongly upon learning her boyfriend gives his children $19,000 annually, citing financial incompatibility as a concern. The situation raises questions about values alignment and whether differing financial priorities indicate relationship red flags.
content: “He spent $1,000 on his girlfriend at Christmas and several hundred dollars on each of her children.”

zh.title: 我朋友的女友在得知他每年给孩子1.9万美元后'大发雷霆'。这是危险信号吗?
zh.summary: 一位女性在得知她的男友每年给他的孩子1.9万美元后表示强烈反对，理由是财务不兼容。这种情况引发了关于价值观一致性的问题，以及不同的财务优先级是否表明关系危险信号。

title: Fed nominee Warsh clears a hurdle to Senate hearing
summary: Kevin Warsh, nominated to a Federal Reserve position, submitted required ethics paperwork to the Senate, advancing toward his confirmation hearing. The procedural milestone signals progress in the Senate confirmation process for Fed leadership.
content: Kevin Warsh submitted required ethics paperwork to the Senate Monday.

zh.title: 美联储提名人沃什越过参议院听证会的障碍
zh.summary: 被提名为美联储职位的凯文·沃什向参议院提交了所需的道德文件，向其确认听证会迈进。这一程序里程碑标志着美联储领导人参议院确认流程的进展。

title: Some brave traders who made a leveraged bet on chip stocks nearly doubled their return in almost 10 days
summary: Traders who placed leveraged bets on semiconductor stocks achieved significant gains following chipmaker rallies triggered by U.S.-Iran conflict market declines starting March 30. The sharp returns demonstrate both the potential rewards and risks of leveraged positions during volatile periods.
content: Chipmakers have surged since the market’s lows on March 30 from the U.S.-Iran war. Those willing to take on major risk saw even bigger returns.

zh.title: 一些勇敢的交易员在芯片股票上的杠杆押注在近10天内几乎翻倍
zh.summary: 在半导体股票上进行杠杆押注的交易员在芯片制造商反弹后获得了显著收益，该反弹由3月30日开始的美伊冲突市场下跌引发。这些巨大回报既展示了波动期间杠杆头寸的潜在回报，也展示了风险。

title: Oracle pops 11%, leading bounce back rally in software stocks
summary: Oracle stock surged 11% today, leading a broader recovery in software stocks after steep losses this year due to AI disruption concerns. The rally signals potential investor confidence in the sector's ability to recover from recent declines.
content: Oracle has lost more than a fifth of its value this year on AI disruption concerns.

zh.title: Oracle股价暴涨11%，领导软件股票反弹
zh.summary: Oracle股票今日上涨11%，领导软件股票在今年因AI颠覆担忧而大幅下跌后的更广泛复苏。这次反弹表明投资者对该部门从最近跌幅中恢复的能力充满信心。

title: IRS publishes list of occupations that qualify for 'no tax on tips' provision
summary: The IRS has released the final list of occupations eligible for the "no tax on tips" provision, which allows certain workers to deduct earnings from tips. This clarification resolves uncertainty about which workers can benefit from this recent tax break.
content: The "big beautiful bill" introduced a tax provision that allows some workers to deduct the tips they earn. The IRS released the final rule on who qualifies.

zh.title: IRS公布符合"小费无税"条款资格的职业列表
zh.summary: IRS发布了符合"小费无税"条款资格的最终职业列表，该条款允许某些工人扣除来自小费的收入。此澄清解决了关于哪些工人可以从这一最近的税收优惠中受益的不确定性。

title: Goldman shares fall on imperfect quarterly results. Here's our advice on the stock from here
summary: Goldman Sachs shares declined following mixed first-quarter results, but analysts maintain their investment thesis on the banking giant despite the quarterly disappointments.
content: Our thesis on the investment banking giant remains intact despite some blemishes in its first-quarter earnings.

zh.title: 高盛股票因不完美季度业绩下跌。我们对该股票的建议
zh.summary: 高盛股票在首季度业绩混合后下跌，但分析师尽管季度失利，仍坚持对这家银行巨头的投资逻辑。

title: Here's 1 move experts agree is essential for navigating financial uncertainty
summary: Financial experts recommend preparation and planning as the essential strategy for managing economic uncertainty regardless of market conditions. The guidance emphasizes that proactive financial management is always timely given current market volatility.
content: Regardless of what the future brings, now is always the right time to prepare. Here are the best ways to navigate financial uncertainty, according to experts.

zh.title: 专家一致认同应对金融不确定性的关键举措
zh.summary: 金融专家建议准备和规划是管理经济不确定性的必要战略，无论市场条件如何。该指导强调，鉴于当前市场波动性，积极的财务管理总是及时的。

title: Texas attorney general probes Lululemon over potential 'forever chemicals' in its activewear
summary: Texas's attorney general is investigating whether Lululemon's activewear contains PFAS (forever chemicals), chemicals customers would not expect based on the brand's marketing. The probe questions whether the company's products align with their environmental and health positioning.
content: The probe will examine whether Lululemon's athletic apparel contains PFAS, which the brand's customers would not expect based on its marketing, Paxton said

zh.title: 德州检察长调查Lululemon运动服装中的潜在"永久化学物质"
zh.summary: 德州检察长正在调查Lululemon运动服装是否含有PFAS（永久化学物质），这些是客户根据该品牌营销不会预期的化学物质。该调查质疑该公司产品是否符合其环保和健康定位。

title: These stocks are taking big hits from worries about higher gasoline prices
summary: Consumer discretionary stocks are declining as rising gasoline prices from Middle East conflict escalation threaten to dampen consumer spending. Higher fuel costs could reduce discretionary purchasing power for consumers already facing economic pressures.
content: Stocks of a number of consumer discretionary sector companies were falling amid worries that rising gasoline prices as a result of the latest escalation in the Middle East conflict would hurt consumer sentiment and spending.

zh.title: 这些股票因担忧汽油价格上升而大幅下跌
zh.summary: 由于中东冲突升级导致汽油价格上升可能会抑制消费支出，消费类股票下跌。较高的燃料成本可能会减少已经面临经济压力的消费者的可自由支配购买力。

title: Wind energy ETF technical catalyst could herald further gains, Katie Stockton says
summary: The wind energy ETF (FAN) has broken through its February resistance level, and technical analyst Katie Stockton suggests this breakthrough could drive further gains toward the 2021 peak in coming weeks.
content: FAN recently cleared its February high, which gives it a better chance of clearing the 2021 peak over the coming weeks.

zh.title: 风能ETF技术面催化剂可能预示进一步涨幅，凯蒂·斯托克顿表示
zh.summary: 风能ETF (FAN) 已突破2月份的阻力位，技术分析师凯蒂·斯托克顿认为这一突破可能在未来几周推动进一步涨幅，向2021年的高位靠近。

title: McDonald's to add refreshers, crafted sodas to U.S. menus
summary: McDonald's is expanding its U.S. menu with refreshers and crafted sodas after closing its CosMc's concept stores, lessons learned from testing the premium beverage market. The move represents the company's continued effort to compete in the high-margin beverage category.
content: The fast food giant last year shut down its five CosMc's concept stores in the U.S., which the company said it had opened to test the beverages space.

zh.title: 麦当劳将在美国菜单中添加果饮和手工汽水
zh.summary: 麦当劳在关闭其CosMc's概念店后，正在美国菜单上添加果饮和手工汽水，吸取了高端饮料市场测试的经验教训。此举代表了该公司在高利润饮料类别中保持竞争力的持续努力。

title: Trump’s blockade of Iranian ports takes effect. Stocks are shrugging off escalation concerns.
summary: The U.S. military has implemented a blockade of Iranian ports, raising oil prices amid Middle East escalation, but U.S. stock markets remain relatively unfazed by the geopolitical tension.
content: The American military on Monday was implementing a blockade on all ships entering and exiting Iranian ports, with the escalation pushing oil prices higher but not rattling U.S. stocks that much.

zh.title: 特朗普对伊朗港口的封锁生效。股票市场对升级风险漠不关心。
zh.summary: 美国军方实施了对伊朗港口的封锁，在中东局势升级之际推高油价，但美国股市对地缘政治紧张局势保持相对冷静。

title: Tariff refunds unlikely to benefit consumers, CNBC CFO Council survey finds
summary: A CNBC CFO Council survey indicates that despite potential billions in government tariff refunds, consumers are unlikely to see direct benefit as companies absorb rather than pass through savings. CFOs suggest corporate margins rather than consumer prices will benefit from any refunds.
content: Although the government could pay billions of dollars in tariff refunds, consumers shouldn't expect to see money back, according to a CNBC CFO Council survey.

zh.title: 关税退款不太可能造福消费者，CNBC首席财务官委员会调查发现
zh.summary: CNBC首席财务官委员会的调查表明，尽管政府可能退还数十亿美元的关税，但由于企业吸收而非转嫁节省，消费者不太可能直接受益。首席财务官表示，企业利润率而非消费者价格将从任何退款中获益。

title: This is the real reason behind the U.S. dollar’s climb as the Iran conflict drags on
summary: The U.S. dollar has strengthened this year following failed diplomatic efforts to resolve the Iran conflict, reflecting investors' flight to safe-haven assets amid geopolitical tensions.
content: The U.S. dollar is up this year, based on Monday afternoon trading levels, following failed talks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend to end the conflict in the Middle East.

zh.title: 随着伊朗冲突持续，美元上升背后的真实原因
zh.summary: 美元今年因解决伊朗冲突的外交努力失败而走强，反映了投资者在地缘政治紧张形势中对避险资产的青睐。

title: Is OpenAI outgrowing Microsoft? A new Amazon alliance raises the stakes.
summary: A leaked memo from OpenAI's revenue leadership suggests growing tensions with Microsoft as OpenAI strengthens its partnership with Amazon, raising questions about the future of their collaborative relationship.
content: A reported leaked memo from OpenAI’s revenue chief signals a deepening rift with Microsoft, as the ChatGPT creator deepens its relationship with Amazon.

zh.title: OpenAI是否正在超越微软？新的亚马逊联盟提高了赌注。
zh.summary: OpenAI收入领导层泄露的备忘录暗示与微软的关系日益紧张，原因是OpenAI加强与亚马逊的合作伙伴关系，这引发了对两者合作未来的疑问。

title: BlackRock raises view on U.S. stocks on belief that war is over, profits are up
summary: BlackRock, managing $14 trillion in assets, upgraded its U.S. stock rating to overweight from neutral, citing the conclusion of conflict and rising corporate profits as positive indicators for equities.
content: The firm, which manages $14 trillion for clients, said in its weekly market note that it raised the rating a notch to overweight from neutral.

zh.title: 贝莱德因认为战争结束、利润上升而上调美国股票评级
zh.summary: 管理14万亿美元资产的贝莱德将美国股票评级从中性上调至超配，理由是冲突结束和企业利润上升对股票是积极指标。

title: Trump deletes Truth Social image depicting him as Jesus: 'I thought it was me as a doctor'
summary: President Trump deleted a Truth Social post showing an AI-generated image of himself as Jesus, claiming he believed it depicted him as a doctor, following previous posts featuring similar religious imagery.
content: President Donald Trump in May 2025 posted an apparent AI image depicting himself as a Catholic pope after the death of Pope Francis.

zh.title: 特朗普删除Truth Social上将其描绘为耶稣的图像：「我以为那是我作为医生的样子」
zh.summary: 特朗普总统删除了一条Truth Social帖子，该帖子显示了他本人作为耶稣的AI生成图像，他声称他认为这描绘的是他作为医生的样子，此前他还发布过类似的宗教图像。

title: Judge dismisses Trump $10B defamation lawsuit against Murdoch, WSJ about Epstein letter
summary: A judge dismissed President Trump's $10 billion defamation lawsuit against Rupert Murdoch and the Wall Street Journal over reporting about an alleged letter to Jeffrey Epstein, which Trump continues to deny writing.
content: President Donald Trump has denied sending a bawdy 50th birthday letter to his then-friend Jeffrey Epstein at the request of Ghislaine Maxwell.

zh.title: 法官驳回特朗普针对默多克和《华尔街日报》关于爱泼斯坦信函的100亿美元诽谤诉讼
zh.summary: 一位法官驳回了特朗普总统针对鲁珀特·默多克和《华尔街日报》提起的100亿美元诽谤诉讼，该诉讼涉及对一封据称写给杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的信的报道，特朗普持续否认自己写过这封信。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Goldman Sachs, Revolution Medicines, Fastenal & more
summary: These are the stocks posting the largest premarket moves, including Goldman Sachs, Revolution Medicines, and Fastenal. Such premarket activity signals investor sentiment before regular trading hours begin.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 股票盘前最大涨跌幅：高盛、革命医学、Fastenal等
zh.summary: 这些是盘前涨跌幅最大的股票，包括高盛、革命医学和Fastenal。这种盘前活动反映了投资者在常规交易时间开始前的情绪。

title: Ineos Automotive: Startup backed by a knighted billionaire and soccer mogul wants to rekindle the rugged SUV market
summary: Ineos Automotive, backed by a billionaire entrepreneur and soccer investor, aims to revive the rugged SUV market with plans to grow U.S. sales by 30-35% and achieve profitability this year. The company's ambitious targets position it as a significant player in the competitive automotive sector.
content: The automaker has plans to grow sales in the U.S. by roughly 30% to 35%, as well as a target to achieve breakeven this year, executives exclusively told CNBC.

zh.title: Ineos汽车：由爵士身份的亿万富翁和足球大亨支持的创业公司欲重振越野SUV市场
zh.summary: Ineos汽车由一位亿万富翁企业家和足球投资者支持，旨在重振越野SUV市场，计划将美国销售额增长30-35%，并在今年实现盈利。该公司的雄心勃勃目标使其成为竞争激烈的汽车行业中的重要参与者。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, CoreWeave, Blackstone, Starbucks, Netflix & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major recommendations on several key stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, and others on Monday. These calls reflect shifting market sentiment and can influence investor decisions across technology and other sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

zh.title: 周一最大的分析师推荐：英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、CoreWeave、黑石、星巴克、Netflix等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师在周一对包括英伟达、苹果、特斯拉等在内的多只关键股票发布了重大推荐。这些推荐反映了市场情绪的变化，可能会影响投资者在科技和其他行业的决策。

title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading — here's why the stock is falling
summary: Goldman Sachs exceeded earnings expectations driven by record equities trading as institutional investors repositioned amid AI-driven market disruption. Despite beating estimates, the stock fell as investors' expectations may have already priced in strong performance.
content: Trading desks across Wall Street have been busy at the start of the year as institutional investors set new positions against the churn of AI-led disruption.

zh.title: 高盛创纪录股票交易超出预期——股票下跌的原因
zh.summary: 高盛因机构投资者在人工智能驱动的市场动荡中重新配置而实现创纪录的股票交易，超过盈利预期。尽管超过预期，但股票仍然下跌，因为投资者的预期可能已经反映了强劲表现。

title: Europe cheers Orbán defeat as a bloody nose for the Kremlin – but Hungary’s future remains contested
summary: Hungary's pro-EU candidate defeated incumbent Viktor Orbán in a result celebrated by European leaders as weakening Russian influence in the region. However, Hungary's political future remains uncertain as disputes persist over the election outcome.
content: European leaders welcome the election of a pro-EU candidate while Russia and the U.S. lose an ally after the defeat of Viktor Orbán.

zh.title: 欧洲为欧尔班失败欢呼，视其为克里姆林宫的打击——但匈牙利未来仍存争议
zh.summary: 匈牙利亲欧盟候选人击败现任总理维克多·欧尔班，欧洲领导人对此欢呼，认为这削弱了俄罗斯在该地区的影响力。然而，由于对选举结果的争议仍在继续，匈牙利的政治未来仍不确定。

title: Goldman didn’t deliver the blowout earnings that was expected, and the stock is falling
summary: Goldman Sachs' earnings and revenue surpassed analyst expectations but by smaller margins than investors anticipated. The stock declined as the earnings beat failed to match the magnitude of gains investors had expected.
content: Goldman’s earnings and revenue beat expectations, but not by as much as investors had hoped.

zh.title: 高盛没有交付预期的惊人收益，股票正在下跌
zh.summary: 高盛的收益和收入虽然超过分析师预期，但幅度小于投资者预期。由于收益超出预期的幅度未能达到投资者预期的收益水平，股票下跌。

title: Farmers ask Stormont for financial help with fuel costs
summary: Northern Ireland's farmers are requesting government financial support to offset soaring fuel costs, which have risen globally due to tensions involving the US, Israel, and Iran. The request highlights how geopolitical conflicts directly impact agricultural operating expenses.
content: Fuel costs have soared globally as a result of the US-Israel war with Iran.

zh.title: 农民要求斯托蒙特政府帮助应对燃料成本
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰农民要求政府财政支持以抵消飙升的燃料成本，这些成本因涉及美国、以色列和伊朗的紧张局势而全球上升。这一请求突出了地缘政治冲突如何直接影响农业运营费用。

title: Revolution Medicines' potential breakthrough pancreatic cancer drug succeeds in late-stage trial
summary: Revolution Medicines announced its pancreatic cancer drug succeeded in a Phase 3 late-stage clinical trial, representing a significant breakthrough in treating one of cancer's deadliest forms. The positive trial results advance the drug toward potential regulatory approval.
content: Revolution Medicines' drug for pancreatic cancer succeeded in a highly anticipated Phase 3 trial.

zh.title: 革命医学公司潜在突破性胰腺癌药物在晚期试验中取得成功
zh.summary: 革命医学公司宣布其胰腺癌药物在第3阶段晚期临床试验中取得成功，这是治疗最致命癌症之一的重大突破。积极的试验结果使该药物向潜在的监管批准迈进。

title: How the Iran war affects your money and bills
summary: The Middle East conflict is driving up costs across multiple sectors of household expenses, including petrol, energy bills, and food. Understanding these economic impacts helps consumers anticipate inflationary pressures on their personal finances.
content: The conflict in the Middle East has increased pressure on the cost of petrol, household energy bills and even food.

zh.title: 伊朗战争如何影响你的金钱和账单
zh.summary: 中东冲突正在推高家庭支出的多个部门的成本，包括汽油、能源账单和食品。了解这些经济影响有助于消费者预期个人财务的通胀压力。

title: Treasury yields rise as collapse of Iran talks clouds inflation outlook
summary: Treasury yields rose as negotiations between the US and Iran collapsed, increasing uncertainty about the inflation outlook. The breakdown in talks amplified concerns about geopolitical risk and its potential economic consequences.
content: Treasury yields edged higher on Monday as the breakdown of negotiations between Iran and the U.S. clouded the inflation outlook once again.

zh.title: 美国国债收益率上升，伊朗谈判破裂加剧通胀前景不确定性
zh.summary: 随着美国和伊朗的谈判破裂，美国国债收益率上升，加大了对通胀前景的不确定性。谈判的破裂加剧了市场对地缘政治风险及其潜在经济后果的担忧。

title: This Chinese video platform will outperform as it ramps up game releases, says Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley upgraded a Chinese video platform to overweight rating, citing the company's expanding game release strategy as a growth driver. The upgrade signals confidence in the platform's ability to outperform competitors through content diversification.
content: The investment bank upgraded the stock to overweight from equal weight.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利称这家中国视频平台将随着游戏发行的增加而表现出色
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利将一家中国视频平台升级至超配评级，认为该公司不断扩大的游戏发行战略是增长动力。此次升级表明该机构对该平台通过内容多元化来超越竞争对手的能力充满信心。

title: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
summary: Rockstar Games, maker of the Grand Theft Auto franchise, confirmed it was hacked for the second time by English-speaking hackers. The company downplayed the incident's impact, suggesting minimal damage or data exposure resulted from the breach.
content: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.

zh.title: GTA制造商Rockstar Games再次遭黑客入侵但淡化了影响
zh.summary: 游戏制造商Rockstar Games证实第二次遭英语黑客入侵。该公司淡化了此事件的影响，暗示该漏洞造成的损害或数据泄露最少。

title: Private credit is actually built to survive the ghosts of the great financial crisis
summary: Private credit firms are structurally resilient to financial crises due to high equity cushions and long-term lockups exceeding 10 years. Unlike traditional banks vulnerable to runs, these investment vehicles cannot face sudden liquidity pressures like Lehman Brothers did.
content: With 80% equity cushions and 10-year lockups, Wall Street’s “anti-banks” won’t face a “Lehman moment.”

zh.title: 私人信贷实际上天生就能应对大金融危机的影响
zh.summary: 由于拥有高额股权缓冲和超过10年的长期锁定期，私人信贷公司在结构上具有抵御金融危机的能力。与容易遭受挤兑风险的传统银行不同，这些投资工具不会面临雷曼兄弟那样的突然流动性压力。

title: Why ‘Rule of 10’ stocks like Nvidia and Meta are now poised for a comeback, according to Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs analysts argue that secular growth stocks like Nvidia and Meta, which trade on elevated valuations, are positioned for a comeback as bond yield dynamics shift. Higher interest rates have pressured these stocks, but declining yields could reignite growth investor interest.
content: Higher bond yields have been hitting secular growth stocks, but that may be about to change.

zh.title: 高盛认为英伟达和Meta等"10法则"股票现在准备好强势反弹
zh.summary: 高盛分析师认为，像英伟达和Meta这样以高估值交易的长期增长股票，随着债券收益率走势的变化，将迎来反弹。虽然更高的利率对这些股票造成了压力，但收益率的下降可能会重新激发增长投资者的兴趣。

title: UK 'not supporting' U.S. Iran blockade as France's Macron confirms 'multinational' talks on the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The UK declined to support the US-led Iran blockade while France's Macron outlined plans for multinational negotiations on the Strait of Hormuz. The divergence highlights international disagreement on Iran policy despite Trump's expectation of broad allied support.
content: President Donald Trump had signaled that other countries would help the U.S. in its blockade.

zh.title: 英国"不支持"美国对伊朗的封锁，法国马克龙确认就霍尔木兹海峡进行"多边"谈判
zh.summary: 英国拒绝支持美国主导的伊朗封锁，而法国马克龙概述了关于霍尔木兹海峡多边谈判的计划。尽管特朗普期望获得盟国的广泛支持，这种分歧突出了国际社会在伊朗政策上存在的分歧。

title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
summary: A U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt tanker traffic and drive oil prices higher, risking a widening confrontation with China. This geopolitical escalation could deepen global energy instability and lead to dangerous miscalculation.
content: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁可能加深全球最严重能源危机——并冒险犯危险错误
zh.summary: 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁威胁阻止油轮运输并推高油价，面临与中国对抗升级的风险。这种地缘政治升级可能加深全球能源不稳定性并导致危险的误判。

title: Rising fuel costs puts strain on transport charity
summary: A Gloucestershire transport charity must find an additional £20,000 to cover rising fuel costs. The funding shortfall highlights how inflation pressures squeeze nonprofit organizations serving vulnerable populations.
content: A charity in Gloucestershire says it will have to find an extra £20k to cover increased fuel costs.

zh.title: 燃油成本上升给运输慈善机构造成压力
zh.summary: 格洛斯特郡的一家运输慈善机构必须找到额外的20,000英镑来弥补燃油成本上升。资金短缺凸显通胀压力如何挤压为弱势群体服务的非营利组织。

title: From panic to pricing in: Are markets past 'peak fear and sell-off' despite oil price surge?
summary: Market investors appear to have already priced in geopolitical risks associated with the oil surge and are becoming less reactive to headlines. This suggests a potential shift toward stability after initial panic-driven selling.
content: Investors appear to have already priced in much of the geopolitical risks and are growing less reactive to headlines.

zh.title: 从恐慌到定价：尽管油价飙升，市场是否已经度过"最高恐惧和抛售"？
zh.summary: 市场投资者似乎已经将与油价飙升相关的地缘政治风险计入价格，对头条新闻的反应越来越少。这表明在初始恐慌性抛售后可能出现向稳定性转变。

title: European stocks set to start the week lower as Iran peace hopes fade
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower as traders reassess Middle East developments amid fading hopes for peace negotiations. The pullback reflects renewed investor caution about geopolitical risks.
content: European stocks are expected to start the new trading week on a somber note as global traders assess developments in the Middle East.

zh.title: 伊朗和平希望破灭，欧洲股市周一开盘走低
zh.summary: 随着和平谈判希望减弱，交易员重新评估中东局势，欧洲股市预计开盘走低。此跌幅反映出投资者对地缘政治风险的重新谨慎态度。

title: 'School breakfast club has best toast in the world'
summary: A free breakfast club at Lawley Primary serves 120 pupils and students credit it with improving their ability to learn. The program addresses food insecurity while supporting educational outcomes.
content: Up to 120 pupils go to the free club at Lawley Primary and say it helps get them ready to learn.

zh.title: "学校早餐俱乐部拥有世界上最好的吐司"
zh.summary: 劳利小学的免费早餐俱乐部为120名学生服务，学生们认为它提高了他们的学习能力。该项目既解决了粮食不安全问题，又支持了教育成果。

title: Why pressure is mounting at oil giant BP ahead of its annual general meeting
summary: Oil giant BP faces potential shareholder resistance at its upcoming annual general meeting. The mounting pressure reflects investor concerns about the company's strategy and performance.
content: Oil giant BP is bracing for a possible shareholder revolt at its upcoming annual general meeting.

zh.title: 石油巨头BP年度股东大会前压力日益增加的原因
zh.summary: 石油巨头BP在即将召开的年度股东大会上面临潜在的股东反抗。日益增加的压力反映了投资者对公司战略和业绩的担忧。

title: Dow futures drop 500 points after Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade as talks fail: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures fell 500 points after Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following failed diplomatic talks. The sharp reversal erases earlier gains as geopolitical tensions reignite market concerns.
content: All three major averages are coming off their best week since November on hopes that the conflict will soon come to an end.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布霍尔木兹海峡封锁谈判失败后道指期货下跌500点：实时更新
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布因外交谈判失败而封锁霍尔木兹海峡后，美国股指期货下跌500点。这一急剧反转消除了早期涨幅，地缘政治紧张局势重新引起市场担忧。

title: UK could adopt EU single market rules under new legislation
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is proposing legislation allowing the UK government to adopt EU single market rules without parliamentary approval. The move signals a potential shift toward closer post-Brexit regulatory alignment.
content: Sir Keir Starmer is planning a law which will mean that the UK government can adopt EU single market rules, without them being voted on in Parliament.

zh.title: 英国可根据新立法采纳欧盟单一市场规则
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默提议立法，允许英国政府不经议会批准而采纳欧盟单一市场规则。这一举措表明可能向脱欧后更紧密的监管协调方向转变。

title: Trump blasts Pope Leo for criticism of U.S. foreign policy
summary: Pope Leo, the first U.S.-born pope, has condemned Trump's military action against Iran, prompting sharp public criticism from Trump. The clash highlights deep divisions over U.S. military intervention policy.
content: Leo, the first U.S.-born pope who hails from Chicago, has condemned Trump's war effort with Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普猛烈抨击教宗利奥对美国外交政策的批评
zh.summary: 首位美国出生的教宗利奥谴责了特朗普对伊朗的军事行动，引发特朗普的尖锐公开批评。这场冲突突显了在美国军事干预政策上的深刻分歧。

title: Eric Swalwell suspends campaign for California governor amid sexual misconduct allegations
summary: Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell has suspended his California gubernatorial campaign following sexual misconduct allegations from multiple women. The withdrawal reflects intensifying accountability pressures for political candidates.
content: Multiple women have reportedly accused Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell of sexual misconduct, among them a former staffer who alleges he sexually assaulted her.

zh.title: 埃里克·斯瓦韦尔暂停加州州长竞选，面临性不当行为指控
zh.summary: 民主党众议员埃里克·斯瓦韦尔在多名女性提出性不当行为指控后，暂停了他的加州州长竞选。这次退出反映了政治候选人面临的日益加强的问责压力。

title: Move now to seize this potential stock-market crisis and opportunity
summary: Financial advisors recommend preparing lists of stocks and closed-end funds to buy if markets decline further. The guidance frames current market volatility as a potential buying opportunity for investors with available capital.
content: If you have a wish list of stocks or closed-end funds that you have wanted to buy if they go on sale, now is the time to get it ready.

zh.title: 立即采取行动抓住这个潜在的股市危机和机遇
zh.summary: 财务顾问建议准备股票和封闭式基金清单，以便在市场进一步下跌时购买。该建议将当前市场波动框架化为拥有可用资本的投资者的潜在买入机会。

title: Oil jumps above $100 as US to blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
summary: Oil prices surged above $100 after failed U.S.-Iran peace negotiations, prompting the U.S. to move toward blockading Iranian ports. The collapse of talks raises concerns about a deepening global energy crisis and potential impact on worldwide energy costs.
content: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.

zh.title: 和平谈判失败后，美国将封锁伊朗港口，油价飙升至100美元以上
zh.summary: 美国与伊朗和平谈判失败后，油价飙升至100美元以上，促使美国开始封锁伊朗港口。谈判破裂引发了对全球能源危机加剧和全球能源成本影响的担忧。

title: Trump says he’s closing the Strait of Hormuz. Has he been reading MarketWatch?
summary: President Trump announced plans to close the Strait of Hormuz following failed U.S.-Iran negotiations. The move has significant implications for oil markets and investors holding oil stocks during geopolitical tensions.
content: News over the weekend illustrates once again the advantage of having oil stocks in your retirement accounts.

zh.title: 特朗普说他要关闭霍尔木兹海峡。他是在读MarketWatch吗？
zh.summary: 总统特朗普宣布了在美国与伊朗谈判失败后关闭霍尔木兹海峡的计划。此举对石油市场和在地缘政治紧张局势期间持有石油股票的投资者有重大影响。

title: Asia markets open lower as oil surges after U.S. moves to blockade Iran ports
summary: Oil prices surged above $100 following the collapse of U.S.-Iran negotiations and announcement of a U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports. Asian markets opened with losses amid concerns over geopolitical tensions and energy implications.
content: Oil prices surged past $100 after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and Washington moved toward a naval blockade, setting a cautious tone for Asia markets at the open.

zh.title: 美国采取行动封锁伊朗港口后油价飙升，亚洲市场低开
zh.summary: 美国与伊朗谈判破裂和美国宣布对伊朗港口实施海军封锁后，油价飙升至100美元以上。在地缘政治紧张局势和能源影响的担忧中，亚洲市场低开。
